task.objective: Update all dashboard pages to use lastRunOnly based on filter state
task.context:
Filter behavior: - No filter → lastRunOnly = false (show all) - Filter applied, historic unchecked → lastRunOnly = true - Filter applied, historic checked → lastRunOnly = false
Logic: lastRunOnly = hasFilter && !historic

change.description: Pass lastRunOnly to other queries as needed
change.action: Update all db calls that support lastRunOnly
Pass lastRunOnly to client component if it fetches data

change.description: Add lastRunOnly to API fetch if component fetches data
change.action: Update useEffect fetch to include lastRunOnly param: if (lastRunOnly) params.set("lastRunOnly", "true")
Read lastRunOnly from searchParams Pass to getReliabilityScore options

testing.test: Main dashboard: No filter → shows all runs data
Main dashboard: Branch filter → shows last run only
Main dashboard: Branch + Historic → shows all runs for branch
Reliability page: Same behavior as main dashboard
Performance page: Same behavior as main dashboard
All charts update correctly on filter change
Run: npm run build (no TypeScript errors)

mandatory_commit_step.commit_format: feat(overall-reliability-performance-improvements): phase-04 - Integrate filter logic into all dashboard pages
